Privacy Policy

This privacy policy applies to the Expenser app (hereby referred to as "Application") for mobile devices that was created by Yadukrishna as a Free service.

Data Collection and Use

The Application collects and stores all financial data (expenses, categories, and profiles) locally on your device using an encrypted Room database. The Application does not send your personal or financial data to any external servers.

Third Party Access

Since the Application does not collect any data, no information is shared with third parties. The links to GitHub, Email, and Instagram are provided for developer contact only and do not track user activity within the app.

Security

I value your trust in using the Application, and I strive to protect your personal information by keeping it offline. However, remember that no method of electronic storage is 100% secure.

Contact Me

If you have any questions or suggestions about my Privacy Policy, do not hesitate to contact me at yaduk883@gmail.com.
